I need to find the frame when we first entered level 3. Let me check the transitions to find when level 3 started.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find when level 3 started
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    if t.after_frame.level == 3:
        print(f"Level 3 started at transition {i}, action: {t.action}")
        seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
        print("White (W) nodes:")
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'W':
                row_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
                col_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
                print(f"  id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, top=({row_min},{col_min})")
        print("Black (B) nodes:")
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'B':
                row_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
                col_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
                print(f"  id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, top=({row_min},{col_min})")
        print("Colored markers:")
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] in ('N', 'p', 'Y') and n['pixels'] <= 5:
                row_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
                col_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
                print(f"  {n['color']}: top=({row_min},{col_min})")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
